rationale: The cited paper develops a mean-variance framework linking customer satisfaction level/heterogeneity to shareholder value and shareholder value volatility, which closely matches the citing paper’s core focus on customer-behavior drivers of cash flow level and volatility (and shareholder value implications). The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior work from level-only outcomes to volatility, so this citation is plausibly a substantive theoretical/empirical foundation rather than a generic mention.
